title: 专业人士四大特征 / Four characteristics of a professional
point: 掌握专业知识的证据、可靠性、管理自身利益、对同业的忠诚精神。 / Evidence of mastery of subject matter, reliability, management of self-interest, and a spirit of loyalty to fellow representatives.
keyfacts: 专业人士=从事特定活动的胜任者 / A professional is a competent person engaged in a specific activity
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.2–1.5

title: 掌握知识的证据 / Evidence of mastery
point: 技术知识与技能赋予可信度;代表须达入门学历、通过相关课程并每年完成规定 CPD 时数。 / Technical knowledge and skills give credibility; representatives must meet academic entry requirements, pass relevant courses, and complete prescribed CPD hours per year.
keyfacts: CPD 用于紧跟法律、新产品与新技术 / CPD keeps reps abreast of law, new products and technologies
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.2

title: 管理自身利益 / Management of self-interest
point: 利益冲突时客户利益在合理范围内优先;追求自利可接受,但'纯自私的商业观'不可接受。 / On a conflict of interest the client's interest prevails within a reasonable scope; pursuing self-interest is acceptable but a 'strictly selfish commercial view' is not.
keyfacts: 代表无须做免费工作 / A professional is not expected to do free work
客户利益过于压倒性可请求被解除服务 / If client's interest is too overwhelming, may ask to be discharged
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.4

title: 对同业的忠诚 / Loyalty to fellow reps
point: 对整个行业的福祉、地位与声誉负有谨慎义务,共同谴责害群之马的不道德及违法行为。 / A duty of care to the industry's well-being, status and reputation, jointly condemning the unethical and illegal acts of a few 'black sheep'.
keyfacts: 维持信任与坦诚的专业声誉 / Maintain a reputation of trust and candour
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.5

title: 强制考试 Notice / Mandatory exam Notice
point: 新加坡代表须通过强制考试,细节见 MAS Notice FAA-N26(代表胜任要求)。 / A Singapore representative must pass a mandatory exam; details are in MAS Notice FAA-N26 (Competency Requirements for Representatives).
keyfacts: FAA-N26 全称:Competency Requirements for Representatives of Financial Advisers
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.4 / MAS Notice FAA-N26

title: 构成专业的要素 / Requirements for a profession
point: 学术研习、入门门槛、独立性、公众认可、管理机关、专业协会、道德守则。 / Academic study, entrance barriers, independence, public recognition, a governing authority, professional associations, and a code of ethics.
keyfacts: 不可自封专业,须设入门门槛 / No self-declared professional; barriers to entry required
FAA 2001 为主要规管成文法,MAS 主管 / FAA 2001 is the main statute; MAS administers it
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.2–2.9

title: 新加坡无单一协会 / No single association
point: 新加坡没有单一协会代表全体代表,但有数个可信协会代表不同类别代表;MAS 另发公平交易指引。 / There is no single association for all representatives in Singapore, but several credible associations represent different categories; the MAS also issues FAIR Dealing guidelines.
keyfacts: 协会以道德守则设定成员行为标准 / Associations set conduct standards via a code of ethics
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.5, s2.8–2.9

title: 客户十项期望 / Ten client expectations
point: 倾听、答疑、充分事实查找、教育客户、评估风险/知识、告知资历、持续服务、妥善处理金钱、转介专家、信息不脱节。 / Listen, answer questions, gather sufficient info, educate, assess knowledge/risk, state credentials, give on-going service, handle money properly, refer to experts, and stay in touch with information.
keyfacts: 复杂高风险产品(ILP/ETF)应做客户知识评估 CKA / CKA needed for complex high-risk products like ILPs/ETFs
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s3.3–3.12

title: 处理金钱事务 / Handling money matters
point: 除非另获授权,代表不应直接收款;现金交公司出纳,支票抬头为公司并尽快交出纳。 / Unless authorised, a representative should not collect payment directly; cash goes to the firm's cashier and cheques are made payable to the company and handed over promptly.
keyfacts: 目的:避免混同、不当处理或挪用款项的指控 / Purpose: avoid allegations of comingling or misappropriation
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s3.10

title: 代表定义 FAA s2(1) / Definition of 'representative'
point: FAA 第 2(1) 条:为财务顾问执行任何财务咨询服务的人,无论是否获酬或报酬形式如何,含其高级人员。 / Under s2(1), a person who performs any financial advisory service for a financial adviser, whether or not remunerated and however remunerated, including its officers.
keyfacts: 受 MAS 依 FAA 规管 / Regulated by the MAS under the FAA
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s4.2 / FAA s2(1)

title: 一个主事人规则 FAA s27(1) / One-principal rule
point: 代表只能为一个主事人行事,或为属相关法团的多个主事人行事。 / A representative acts for only one principal, or for more than one only if they are related corporations.
keyfacts: 目的(a)主事人密切监督;(b)厘清身份与投诉赔偿责任 / Aims: (a) close supervision; (b) clarity on status and redress
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s4.3 / FAA s27(1)

title: 专业三大职责 / Three professional duties
point: (a) 守法律法规通知的精神与文字;(b) 遵循所属团体道德守则/咨询销售流程;(c) 客户最佳利益优先。 / (a) Obey the spirit and letter of the law, rules and notices; (b) follow the code of ethics/advisory sales process; (c) put clients' best interests first.
keyfacts: 业务行为最终责任在主事人,但个人须专业行事 / Ultimate responsibility on the principal, but the individual must act professionally
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s4.4, s4.9
